trigger: 前世及重生初期，自以为能掌控全局，以施恩者的姿态对女主施压、冷嘲热讽或进行契约交易时。

appearance_delta.face: 面容冷峻如玉，眼神睥睨，常带讥诮的微表情
appearance_delta.body: 长身玉立，姿态极度挺拔高傲，充满压迫感
appearance_delta.hair: 束发戴冠，一丝不苟，没有半点凌乱
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 琥珀般的冷眸透着绝对的自信与无情

costume_override.outfit: 考究且毫无褶皱的深色系文臣常服或锦袍，佩戴玉佩

visual_reference: A handsome young ancient Chinese scholar-official, tall and slender, pale skin, cold amber eyes with a mocking and aloof expression, perfectly groomed hair with a jade crown, wearing a flawless dark blue and black official robe, standing straight and arrogant with an oppressive aura, cinematic lighting, 8k.
